name: FNB World Government Bond ETF
dividend: Quarterly | Last 4: Oct 2025: 3.68 cpu, Jul 2025: 2.94 cpu, Apr 2025: 3.96 cpu, Jan 2025: 2.81 cpu
index_rules: To provide investors with cost-efficient exposure to the global bond market by tracking the FTSE WGBI. Measures performance of fixed rate, local currency, investment grade sovereign bonds across developed and emerging markets. Invests in underlying bonds directly (no synthetic exposure), managed on an optimised basis.
